commonTemplateChanges.text: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
Add multi-effect ward mode and immunity/password choice fields.
Add spell-granted action direction/placement choice fields.

Add ability-choice fields linked to save-disadvantage riders.
Add animate/reassert mode and slot-scaled undead form choice fields.
Add area target-selection fields for chosen creatures in an area.

commonJsonChanges.text: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data tied to the chosen ability instead of relying on generic controlOptions text.
Add runtime abilityChoice data and allow one selected ability per target.
Add runtime actionPlacementChoice data for cone direction.
Add runtime actionPlacementChoice data for line direction.

Add runtime animatedObjectSelection data.
Add runtime areaDirectionChoice data for the 30-foot line.

examples.issue: Alarm can ward a door, a window, or a 20-foot cube and lets the caster choose audible or mental alarm mode, but JSON keeps those choices in prose.
Catapult requires choosing an eligible object and a travel direction, then resolving a straight-line movement path; current data collapses this to an area line plus prose utility.

Chromatic Orb requires choosing one of six damage types and can leap to additional chosen targets when two or more damage dice match, but runtime JSON stores the damage types as a slash-delimited string and has no leap mechanic.
Create or Destroy Water has four utility modes with different targets, environmental effects, and scaling choices.
Find Familiar requires choosing a familiar form and creature type, and recasting changes the existing familiar's eligible form instead of creating another familiar.

commonTemplateChanges.text: Add savingThrowAdvantage fields for ability lists.
Add a D20 test modifier bucket covering attacks, saves, and ability checks together.
Add a save auto-success/auto-failure bucket keyed by target filter.
Add a time/turn-economy bucket for extra turns and frozen non-caster actors.
Add ability-check disadvantage and shared-save rider fields.
Add ability-check modifier fields for advantage/disadvantage, ability, skill, duration, and source option.
Add ability-check modifier fields for advantage/disadvantage/bonus, chosen ability filter, and duration.
Add ability-check modifier fields for skill-specific Advantage against a marked target.

commonJsonChanges.text: Add runtime rollModifier data for attack rolls and saving throws instead of relying on status-condition name semantics.
Add on-end-turn wall damage and caster-action beam attack effects with shared scaling.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier and sharedSaveRiders; current attack-roll modifier is a partial schema-safe encoding.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data and avoid duplicate-save attack modifier effects until shared-save riders are supported.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for Charisma (Intimidation) advantage while Booming Voice is active.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for disadvantage on checks made with the chosen ability.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Survival) checks made to find the target.
Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data: type advantage, applies to chosen ability, duration while active.

examples.issue: Guidance adds 1d4 to ability checks for the chosen skill, but runtime JSON only records a generic utility description.
Mind Sliver's damage and next-save 1d4 penalty share one failed Intelligence save, but runtime JSON stores them as separate effects that can drift.
Booming Voice grants Advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks for 1 minute, but this ability-check modifier is prose-only.
Vicious Mockery's damage and next-attack Disadvantage rider share one failed Wisdom save, but JSON stores damage and a generic utility effect separately.

Bane subtracts 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws made by failed-save targets, but structured markdown and JSON only apply a generic Bane status; the save outcome was corrected to negates_condition.

commonTemplateChanges.text: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
Add a condition-removal/restoration bucket for named condition endings.

Add area status prevention, status application, possession suppression, and corpse-state protection fields.
Add area-scoped condition fields for conditions that apply only while occupying an area.
Add areaMembership condition fields such as fully_within_area.

commonJsonChanges.text: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

Add runtime Charmed STATUS_CONDITION and domination riders.
Add runtime condition areaMembership=fully_within for Blinded.
Add runtime conditional violationDamage data keyed to command noncompliance.

examples.issue: The Grovel option applies the Prone condition, but that state change is flattened into option text.
The Poisoned condition is represented, though the current duration model is still coarse for 'until the end of your next turn'.

Sleep has a two-stage status flow: failed first save gives Incapacitated until the end of the next turn, then failed second save gives Unconscious for the duration. Runtime JSON now carries both stages, but the relationship is still encoded with generic trigger/requiresStatus fields rather than a dedicated staged status model.
Snare restrains and hoists the creature upside down 3 feet above the ground/floor; Restrained is represented, but the hoisted position and upside-down state are prose-only.
Prone and Incapacitated are now separate status effects, but the rule that the target cannot end Prone on itself while affected is prose-only.

examples.issue: Message is blocked by magical silence and by specific barrier materials/thicknesses, which are not represented structurally.
Thaumaturgy modifies voice volume, flames, and creates a point-originating sound, but these sensory mechanics are collapsed into one description.
Vicious Mockery can target a creature the caster can see or hear; current targeting only records lineOfSight=true and does not represent hearing as an alternate perception path.
The audible alarm creates a handbell sound for 10 seconds within 60 feet of the warded area, but sound duration and radius are not structured.
Comprehend Languages distinguishes heard language, seen signed language, and seen written language, but runtime JSON stores them in one prose description.

examples.issue: Burning Hands ignites flammable objects in the cone that are not worn or carried, but targeting and effects only cover creatures.
The familiar appears and reappears only in unoccupied spaces, eligible forms are Beast CR 0 forms, and one familiar is allowed at a time.
The spell can target only the creature that damaged the caster, and that relationship is not first-class target-filter data.
Tenser's Floating Disk must be created in an unoccupied visible space, but runtime targeting does not expose the unoccupied-space requirement.
Unseen Servant appears in an unoccupied space on the ground, but runtime targeting does not expose unoccupied-space or ground placement constraints.

examples.issue: Mold Earth can excavate/move/deposit loose earth, make difficult terrain, or restore normal terrain; JSON has terrain/manipulation but needs review against all modes.
Magic Mark places color, mark, or symbol on an object or surface for 1 hour.
Tremors causes harmless ground tremors for 1 minute; this gray-zone world-state effect is not structured.
Catapult stops early on impact with a solid surface and then drops the object, but there is no surface collision or fall-state representation.
Comprehend Languages requires touching the surface that contains written language, but this prerequisite is only stored in prose.

examples.issue: Message can pass through solid objects only if the caster is familiar with the target and knows it is beyond the barrier.
Animal Friendship applies the Charmed condition to a Beast for 24 hours, but the status runtime includes inappropriate default repeat-save data that is not in the canonical prose.
Charm Person makes the Charmed creature Friendly and later aware it was Charmed by the caster; the runtime has a generic utility description but no structured friendly-state or awareness payload.
The spell provides knowledge of whether Hallow is active and where it is, but that payload is prose-only.
Detect Magic teaches the spell school when the detected effect was created by a spell, but this knowledge payload is prose-only.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Object or hit-point state needs object/stat fields that are not yet available on every affected low-level spell.
Spare the Dying targets a creature with exactly 0 Hit Points that is not dead; current structured markdown and JSON only say creatures/allies.
Toll the Dead switches from d8 to d12 damage when the target is missing any Hit Points; JSON only preserves this in scaling prose while damage.dice remains 1d8.
Cure Wounds heals 2d8 plus the caster's spellcasting ability modifier, but runtime healing only stores dice 2d8.
The familiar uses the chosen form's statistics, disappears at 0 Hit Points, and leaves worn or carried objects behind when it disappears.

examples.issue: If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the curse to a new creature with a later Bonus Action; this transfer rule is prose-only.
If the marked target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the mark to a new visible creature with a Bonus Action; duration also scales at higher slots.
If the Beast does not reach the destination before the spell ends, the message is lost and the Beast returns to the casting location; duration also scales by slot.

Detect Thoughts can end on successful Wisdom save against deeper probe or on a target's action Intelligence (Arcana) check while attention remains shifted; only prose carries the Arcana escape and attention condition.
Arcane Lock suppression lasts 10 minutes while the spell itself is instantaneous; that temporary suppression duration is not modeled.

examples.issue: Message supports one-target private whisper plus target reply, but JSON only records a prose utility description.
Mold Earth can spell out words on dirt or stone, which is a world-state communication/marking effect.
Command requires the caster to speak a one-word command, but runtime JSON does not make the spoken-word delivery or language/understanding assumptions explicit.
Comprehend Languages grants literal meaning only, reads about one page per minute, and does not decode symbols or secret messages; these communication limitations are prose-only.
Find Familiar grants telepathic communication with the familiar within 100 feet, but telepathy is only a summon subfield and not connected to communication mechanics.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Created objects/forms need object-state fields for durability, placement, dimensions, and disappearance.
Shape Water can form and animate simple water shapes for 1 hour, but the created/animated form is not represented structurally.
Goodberry creates a fixed count of ten magic berries, but count, item identity, and duration are not first-class created-object data.

The servant can interact with objects and perform simple tasks including fetching, cleaning, mending, folding, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks, but allowed task categories are prose-only.
Flame Blade creates a persistent conjured weapon-like object, but the created object is not modeled.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Created sensory effects or minor entities need summon/created-entity fields if they become independently addressable.
Mage Hand creates a persistent controllable entity, but the entity is not modeled with actions, movement, or limits.

The summon is represented, but independent initiative, ally status, no-attack restriction, allowed normal actions, chosen-form statistics, disappearance at 0 HP, item drop, pocket dimension, and active-instance limit are not first-class data.

Unseen Servant is represented as a summon, but size, invisibility, mindless/shapeless force traits, AC, HP, Strength, no-attack rule, task completion/wait behavior, command range ending, and 0-HP ending are not first-class fields.

Find Steed has persistent summon lifecycle, replacement on recast, controlled mount behavior while ridden, independent behavior if caster is Incapacitated, and leave-behind carried gear; runtime summon data is too shallow.

examples.issue: The disk follows the caster when the caster moves more than 20 feet away and remains within 20 feet, but follow movement behavior is only summarized in objectDescription and spatial notes.
The Beast travels toward the specified location at about 25 miles per 24 hours, or 50 miles if it can fly, but runtime JSON only stores this in description text.

Cloud of Daggers lets the caster use a later-turn Magic action to teleport the Cube up to 30 feet, and creatures take damage if the Cube moves into their space; runtime now has initial/enter/end-turn damage but lacks movable-area data and an area-moves-into-target trigger.
Fey Step teleports the steed and rider up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space and recharges after Long Rest, but type-gated teleport action data is not represented.
The location tracking works only while caster and target are on the same plane of existence, but same-plane gating is not first-class.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Repeat action and sustain behavior needs a stronger granted-action/sustain schema for low-level utility cantrips.
Mold Earth limits non-instantaneous active effects to two and allows dismissing one as an action.
Shape Water limits non-instantaneous effects to two active instances and lets the caster dismiss one as an action; this is not structured.
Expeditious Retreat immediately grants Dash and then grants Dash again as a Bonus Action until the spell ends, but runtime JSON keeps this in a generic utility description with grantedActions empty.
Find Familiar uses a Bonus Action for shared senses, Magic actions for dismiss/reappear, and recasting changes the familiar's form.

examples.issue: Alarm's core ward trigger, intrusion conditions, exempt creatures, audible/mental delivery, mental one-mile range, and sleep wake-up are flattened into one utility description.
Sanctuary is a ward with incoming targeting triggers and area-effect bypass; current utility effects preserve some behavior but flatten trigger scope and failed-save options.

Shield's reaction trigger includes being hit by an attack or being targeted by Magic Missile; runtime represents both effects, but the +5 AC effect's reactionTrigger only records when_hit and does not explicitly model 'including against the triggering attack'.

Snare triggers only when a Small, Medium, or Large creature moves onto the ground or floor in the radius. Runtime now filters sizes and records the no-restrained cleanup ending, but the ground/floor movement trigger is not fully first-class.
The sustained lightning arc is a maintained link between caster and target, but runtime JSON represents it only as concentration plus a later action damage effect.

Add runtime attackerSenseException data for Blindsight and Truesight bypassing Blur's disadvantage.
Add runtime detection data for creature-type and Hallow sensing instead of prose-only utility.
Add runtime detection data for poison, poisonous/venomous creature, and magical contagion sensing.
Add runtime divinationProtection data.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Sensory prediction/detection effects need a sensor/information schema when they are more than plain description.
The spell's detected creature types, Hallow detection, location payload, and blocker materials are not represented as first-class detection fields.
The spell detects several poison/disease categories and their locations, but the categories and location payload are prose-only.
The caster can remotely see and hear through the familiar and gains its special senses, but the runtime only stores sharedSenses as a coarse boolean.
Beast Sense's canonical shared perception and special-senses benefit are now reflected in runtime description, but there is still no first-class shared-senses mechanic.

Add disguise/appearance fields for species appearance, no stat change, same size, and same basic shape restrictions.

Add illusion enclosure and breach-trigger fields.
Add illusion fields for image kind, max cube size, movement action, appearance adjustment, physical interaction reveal, Study/Investigation reveal, and discerned-state behavior.

Add runtime disguise/illusion reveal data.

Add runtime dreamEnvironment data.

Add runtime illusion data for creation, movement, reveal rules, and post-reveal transparency.
Add runtime illusion data with max 20-foot cube, Magic action move/update, physical interaction reveal, and Study Intelligence (Investigation) vs spell DC.

examples.issue: Mold Earth can create shapes, colors, words, images, and patterns on dirt or stone for 1 hour.
Minor Creation can create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in the caster's hand and lasts until the end of the next turn.
Altered Eyes changes the caster's eye appearance for 1 minute, which is a visible body/appearance change not represented structurally.
Disguise Self has physical-inspection failure and Study action Intelligence (Investigation) reveal rules, but these reveal mechanics are only prose.

Illusory Script creates an illusion over writing with designated viewers, alternate meaning/handwriting/language, dispel cleanup, and Truesight bypass rules, but JSON keeps all of that in description text.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.

Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
When Charm Person ends, the target knows it was Charmed by the caster; this aftermath knowledge is not structured.
When Calm Emotions ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal, but the restoration/aftermath state is not represented.

commonTemplateChanges.text: Add casting trigger fields for after-hit smite-style spells, including allowed attack sources and target binding.
Add action restriction fields for no Bonus Actions and no Reactions.

Add runtime actionRestrictions data to Confused.
Add runtime actionRestrictions data.

Add runtime castingTrigger data for immediately after hitting a creature with a weapon or Unarmed Strike.

Add runtime opportunityAttackBehavior data.
Add runtime opportunityAttackSuppression data or narrow status condition metadata; clear inappropriate repeatSave/escapeCheck defaults once not-applicable sentinels exist.

examples.issue: The core mechanic is specifically Opportunity Attack suppression until the start of the target's next turn; the current status condition name is broader than the prose and carries inappropriate default escape/repeat-save data.

Arms of Hadar suppresses all reactions until the start of the target's next turn on a failed Strength save; the status rider now uses negates_condition, but still relies on a broad Reactions Suppressed status with inappropriate default repeat-save/escape sentinels.
Dissonant Whispers represents reaction-using forced movement away from the caster, but 'if available' and 'safest route' are only stored in prose/custom formula.
A familiar can deliver a touch spell only by taking its Reaction while within 100 feet, but this is only partly represented as a named special action.
Shining Smite is cast after a triggering weapon or unarmed hit, but runtime timing does not preserve that trigger.

examples.issue: The pull is represented, but the damage only applies if the target is within 5 feet after the pull; that post-movement gate is prose-only.
Thorn Whip's size-gated pull is partially represented, and the runtime direction was corrected to toward_caster, but the optional 'can pull' choice remains flattened.
Thunderwave pushes failed-save creatures and unsecured objects 10 feet away, but runtime JSON keeps both pushes in a generic utility description instead of MOVEMENT/object movement data.
The 15-foot push away following the Line is partially represented, but trigger timing and line-following direction need more precise data.
Gust of Wind changes movement cost directionally, but the cost is prose-only.

examples.issue: Actionable open: Moving created lights/forms needs an owned movable effect schema rather than simple target movement.
Jump grants a specific once-per-turn movement option with a fixed jump distance and movement cost, but this is not modeled as movement data.
Longstrider increases the target's Speed by 10 feet, but runtime JSON stores this as generic utility prose instead of a movement/speed modifier.
The servant can be commanded to move up to 15 feet, but movement is only in objectDescription prose.

Levitate raises and suspends a creature or loose object and later changes altitude by up to 20 feet, but the current movement model has no vertical suspension/altitude-change type and is forced to use teleport.
